title: BEM-921 protocol record
objective:
Create file governance/reports/BEM921_SYSTEM_PROTOCOL_V2.md with content # BEM-921 SYSTEM PROTOCOL V2
Status: SYSTEM_PROTOCOL_V2_APPROVED_WITH_REQUIREMENTS
Date: 2026-05-30
Purpose: new full-system protocol version for evolving the system to working state, incorporating all operator decisions and Claude requirements from today.
Correction applied:
- This is a full-system protocol, not Telegram-only.
- Telegram is one module inside the full roadmap.
- The protocol includes detailed mechanics, not only architecture nouns.
Key operator decisions included:
- Workspace belongs to internal contour, not individual element.
- Main workspace is approved repository code/state.
- Curator is a role and object element; it inherits system/object/channel rules and not contour rules by default.
- Analyst/Auditor/Executor are typical role elements inside internal contours and inherit system/object/contour rules/properties and experience refs.
- No local individual element rules by default.
- Inner contour algorithm: Analyst receives input and prepares proposal; Auditor approves or rejects proposal; Executor executes only approved proposal; Executor reports to Auditor; Auditor approves result or returns through Analyst for revision; repeat until auditor-approved result.
- Vertical communication is curator-to-curator.
- Input to contour is Curator -> Analyst.
- Output from contour is Auditor -> Curator.
- Horizontal contour communication is Auditor A -> Analyst B, or Analyst B requests verified data from Auditor A.
- GitHub Actions and runners are activation/proof mechanisms, not roles.
- Event log and managed channel must record transitions.
- Telegram can exist for any registered curator; main route is GD Curator.
Claude requirements included:
- elements_registry and contours_registry.
- non-null CI/Git commit_sha release proof.
- dispatch consumer trigger.
- telegram input envelope and mapping.
- managed channel consumer.
- deterministic object lifecycle PASS.
- E2E mock/production split.
- workflow concurrency.
- report_period_config owner OPERATOR.
- explicit secret names at operator gate.
- fixed re-audit bundle checklist.
Prompt appendix included:
- Object prompts: General Director, Director, Worker.
- Role templates: Curator, Analyst, Auditor, Executor.
- Contour overlays: GD strategy, GD system-rules, DIR analysis/planning, DIR worker-rules, WRK dynamic execution, WRK testing.
- Operational contracts: Telegram input handler, managed channel consumer, dispatch consumer, GitHub Actions proof runner.
Worker agreement:
- Request: governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator/BEM921_SYSTEM_PROTOCOL_V2_REQUEST.md
- Worker review: governance/audit/internal/results/BEM921_WORKER_SYSTEM_PROTOCOL_V2_REVIEW.md
- Curator response: governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM921_SYSTEM_PROTOCOL_V2_RESPONSE.md
Local operator artifacts:
- BEM921_system_protocol_v2_ru.docx
- BEM921_system_protocol_v2_ru.zip
QA: DOCX rendered to 7 pages; no edge clipping detected.
No issue comments.
